Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Absolutely great today .  Nubs groomers are showing off their deep hard pack base with near daily grooming and fresh snow contributions.  The Spring Sweat Spot seems consistent between 10 AM to 1:30 pm .  Not to be missed !

nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails are groomed and conditions are very good.
nubsNob.comments: Comfortable spring skiing continues today with temperatures expected to rise above freezing this morning and continue into the 40's this afternoon. Expect machine groomed granular snow this morning that should soften as the day goes on. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with an espresso bar. The lifts are spinning daily from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
